mono.purpose: IP addresses, ports, telemetry, and logs.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0ea5e9, #6366f1); color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.95; transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.html:
CPU Engine

Daemon connection status and load logs.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.45); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; color: #f8fafc; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-text { font-size: 13px; color: #94a3b8; }

narrative.overview: LumiNet utilizes a technical, high-precision visual design that balances functional density with immersive aesthetic polish. The environment is dark-first, reflecting the typical physical context of researchers and power users auditing hostile networks in low-light environments.
keyCharacteristics: Deep dark navy surfaces with subtle glass backdrops.
Vibrant, data-carrying neon indicators (cyan for CPU, purple for Memory, green for success status).
High-contrast, scannability-first technical typography pairing Outfit with JetBrains Mono.

rules.name: The Rarity of Glow Rule
rules.body: Glow shadows and neon colors must only be used on active indicators, status dots, or hover actions. Static headers or labels must never use glow effects or neon gradients.

rules.name: The Flat-Border Rule
rules.body: Depth is created using borders with 6% to 12% white opacity. Drop shadows are strictly reserved for popovers, notifications, and telemetry glows.

dos: Do use var(--font-mono) (JetBrains Mono) for all IP addresses, port lists, status messages, and latency numbers.
Do maintain high contrast (> 4.5:1) for all status text on dark panels.
Do use smooth transitions (150ms-200ms) on hover states to keep the console responsive.
donts: Don't use emojis as icons; always use SVG elements or Lucide icons.
Don't use warm-beige or cream color schemes that look like marketing landing templates.
Don't use layout-shifting scale hover properties on charts or tables.
